bundle to be bigger, then it must be split into more than one file.
7.6 The judge may also give different page limits depending on:
• the type of case; or
• the nature of the hearing.
7.7 Page numbering (pagination) Page numbering means putting a reference
number on every page in the bundle, so that the court and the other parties can find
documents easily.
7.8 The way pages are numbered depends on the type of case.
In financial remedy proceedings (about your finances, for example, when you get
divorced), page numbers should usually run from the first page of the bundle to the
last page.
